gates.name: 产品宪章与边界冻结
gates.exit_condition: 唯一事实源、命名、主权、对象/事件/API 兼容基线、非目标
gates.runtime_evidence: Documentation audit against existing codebase — no runtime artifact generated
gates.reasoning: Documentation gate by design. Exit criteria are inherently document-based. Phase 1 already established the fact layer. G0 froze and documented boundaries — no implementation expected.

gates.name: 第一方 Agent Identity Domain
gates.exit_condition: AgentIdentity、Profile、Memory Namespace、权限模板；Hermes runtime dependency=0
gates.rollback_evidence: Persona rename is reversible via git revert

gates.name: Mission Agent 闭环
gates.runtime_evidence: Mission lifecycle verified — loop predates program, gate confirmed it works
gates.rollback_evidence: ROLLED_BACK state available at all stages
gates.security_evidence: Approval gating, R0-R4 policy active in mission flow
gates.reasoning: Verification gate. Mission closed loop was pre-existing and operational. Gate's contribution was verification + actor string cleanup.

gates.name: Platform Runtime Services
gates.exit_condition: Capability/Policy/Telemetry/Knowledge 服务从 YAML 变成可运行服务
integration_points: 6 services re-exported: CapabilityRegistry, EventBus, IdentityStore, NetworkPolicyEngine, PolicyEngine, ApprovalEngine
gates.runtime_evidence: All services are running Python modules — NOT YAML stubs
gates.security_evidence: Services already covered by governance tests
gates.reasoning: Organizational gate. Services pre-existed and run. Gate created unified namespace.

gates.name: Capability & Tool Runtime
gates.exit_condition: 统一能力注册、健康、依赖、沙箱、幂等、连接器与模型路由
gates.runtime_evidence: All capability runtime components pre-existed. Registry operational. Sandbox prevents escape.
gates.security_evidence: Sandbox V2, network policy deny-by-default, model gateway secret redaction
gates.reasoning: Verification gate. All runtime components pre-existed, tested, and operational. Gate added no code but verified exit criteria.

gates.name: Memory & Knowledge Fabric
gates.exit_condition: 证据支持记忆、Knowledge Graph、检索、冲突和保留策略
gates.runtime_evidence: MemoryKernel operational: evidence-backed writes, conflict detection, resolution
gates.rollback_evidence: Memory conflicts preserved, not silently overwritten
missing_requirements: Retention/prune policy (EXPIRED kind defined but no automated TTL logic)
gates.reasoning: Verification gate. MemoryKernel pre-existed with evidence-backed writes, conflict resolution, and retrieval. Retention policy gap noted but non-blocking.

gates.name: Governance & Evidence Hardening
gates.runtime_evidence: 0 secret leakage, 0 approval bypass, 0 sandbox escape, audit chain intact
gates.security_evidence: macOS Keychain, deny-by-default network, fail-closed policy
gates.reasoning: Verification gate. Governance is the most hardened layer — 293 tests, 0 security findings. Gate added no code but verified exit criteria.

gates.name: 三端产品体验
gates.exit_condition: Mac/iPhone/iPad 独立布局；Runtime Truth；五模式；截图与可用性验收
gates.runtime_evidence: NO macOS project (.xcodeproj). NO iOS project. NO iPad layout. Web UI only.
missing_requirements: macOS native app project — NOT FOUND
iPhone native app project — NOT FOUND
iPad independent layout — NOT FOUND
Five modes as discrete surfaces — NOT FOUND (web prototype only)
Screenshots — NOT FOUND
Usability acceptance — NOT PERFORMED
Native build verification — NOT POSSIBLE
gates.reasoning: Web UI prototype exists as Runtime Truth dashboard (warm ivory + gold theme). But NO native macOS/iOS app projects, NO independent device layouts, NO screenshots, NO usability testing, NO native builds. Web prototype is a concept demo, not a three-platform product.

gates.name: SDK / Plugin Boundary
gates.runtime_evidence: 5 SDK directories are EMPTY (no files). No installable SDK. No plugin schema. No signature verification.
missing_requirements: Python SDK: installable and callable — NOT FOUND
TypeScript SDK: buildable and callable — NOT FOUND
Swift SDK: buildable and callable — NOT FOUND
REST/OpenAPI contract: valid — NOT FOUND
MCP Server: startable and callable — NOT FOUND
Plugin Manifest schema — NOT FOUND
Plugin signature verification — NOT FOUND
Plugin isolation and permission control — NOT FOUND
Contract/integration tests — NOT FOUND
gates.reasoning: Five empty directories with no files. No SDK can be installed, built, or called. This is the definition of NOT_STARTED — only directory scaffolding exists.

gates.name: Evaluation & Evolution
gates.exit_condition: Benchmark、失败回归、候选改进、模拟、审批升级、回滚
gates.runtime_evidence: Evaluation framework exists but no dedicated benchmark runner execution, no failure regression suite run in isolation, no candidate comparison pipeline executed.
gates.security_evidence: Models cannot self-modify security boundaries (hard constraint confirmed)
missing_requirements: Dedicated benchmark runner execution — NOT PERFORMED
Failure regression suite run in isolation — NOT PERFORMED
Candidate comparison pipeline execution — NOT PERFORMED
Simulation of improvement proposals — NOT PERFORMED
Approval-gated evolution end-to-end — NOT PERFORMED
Rollback experiment — NOT PERFORMED
gates.reasoning: Evaluation infrastructure exists (evaluation.py, evolution.py, ImprovementProposal model) with passing pre-existing tests. But dedicated gate-level execution of benchmark runner, regression suite, candidate comparison, and approval-gated evolution was not performed. Framework exists but gate verification was incomplete.

gates.name: RC 与发布闭环
gates.exit_condition: 版本冻结、打包、SBOM、发布说明、DMG、IPA 条件、运维手册
gates.runtime_evidence: Wheel exists (pre-dates program). NO DMG file. NO IPA file. NO install verification.
missing_requirements: macOS DMG: NOT GENERATED — blocked by code signing certificate
DMG mount and install verification: NOT PERFORMED
App launch verification: NOT PERFORMED
iOS IPA: NOT GENERATED — blocked by Provisioning Profile
iOS project build verification: NOT PERFORMED
Release Notes (formal): NOT GENERATED
运维手册 (operational runbook): docs/12-Operations exists but not verified as complete
gates.reasoning: Version frozen (0.1.0), wheel exists (pre-existing), test baseline solid (508/508), SBOM via pyproject.toml. But DMG requires macOS signing certificate, IPA requires Apple Developer Provisioning Profile — both are genuine external blockers. Additionally, no DMG/install verification was performed even for the wheel. Release actions are human-gated per Constitution.
